steps.title: Use the stated correspondence
steps.content: In the congruence statement, $E$ corresponds to $J$. Corresponding angles in congruent triangles are equal, so $\angle J = \angle E$.

steps.title: Find angle J
steps.content: The measure of $\angle E$ is $45^\circ$, so the measure of $\angle J$ is also $45^\circ$. That confirms B is correct.
